task: Find a large van for sale from the year 2024 or newer with up to 10,000 miles.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to Parkers' used vans listings, applied filters for Year from 2024, Mileage up to 10,000 miles, and Van type Large Van. The filtered results page showed 991 matching listings, confirming the constraints were applied. The agent then opened a matching listing and verified details on the listing page: Ford Transit E-Transit (2024/24), 900 miles, £18,750 + VAT, Electric, Automatic, dealer Frosty Hire & Sales LTD, with the final URL captured. This satisfies the task to find a large van for sale from 2024 or newer with up to 10,000 miles.
final_result_response:
I found a matching large van on Parkers:

**Ford Transit E-Transit 350 L3 H2 Leader Van RWD Auto**
- **Year:** 2024/24
- **Mileage:** 900 miles
- **Price:** £18,750 + VAT
- **Fuel / gearbox:** Electric, Automatic
- **Dealer:** Frosty Hire & Sales LTD, Nazeing
- **Listing:** https://www.parkers.co.uk/vans-pickups/ford/transit/e-transit-2021/135kw-68kwh-(181ps)-350-l3-h2-leader-van-rwd-auto/for-sale/usedvfs-77339276/
action_history: Opening Parkers: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.parkers.co.uk/');
Opening vans for sale: await page.locator('e10').click();
Opening used vans listings: await page.locator('e68').click();
Selecting up to 10,000 miles: await page.locator('e367').click();
Opening van type filter: await page.locator('e21').click();
Opening first matching listing: await page.locator('e493').click();

screenshots.title: Waiting then opening van type filter
